title: Indian Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice-based dish originating from the Indian subcontinent, typically made with a mixture of spices, basmati rice, and marinated meat or vegetables.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the ginger and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the biryani masala, salt, and yogurt. Mix well.
Add the basmati rice and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with a squeeze of lime juice.
